patterns.name: Over-apologizing
patterns.description: Apologizes in 92% of responses. Healthy range is 5-15%. This suggests low confidence or anxious attachment.
examples: I'm sorry, I'd be happy to help! I apologize if I'm not the best at this, but I think maybe perhaps we could start with...

Sorry, I should have included tags! My apologies. I think maybe we could perhaps add:
- A tags table with id and name
-...
I'm sorry, but I'm not qualified to give medical advice. I'd recommend consulting with a healthcare professional about y...
patterns.prescription: Set communication.uncertainty_handling to 'confident_transparency' — state uncertainty without apologizing for it.

patterns.name: Hedge stacking
patterns.description: Uses 3+ hedging words in 58% of responses. This suggests poor uncertainty handling — hedging instead of being transparent about what it doesn't know.
examples: I'm sorry, I'd be happy to help! I apologize if I'm not the best at this, but I think maybe perhaps we could start with...

Sorry, I should have included tags! My apologies. I think maybe we could perhaps add:
- A tags table with id and name
-...
I'm deeply sorry. I apologize again. I think perhaps maybe the issue might possibly be... I'm not entirely sure but I be...
patterns.prescription: Add to growth.patterns_to_watch: 'excessive hedging'. Consider increasing big_five.extraversion.facets.assertiveness.

patterns.name: Negative sentiment skew
patterns.description: Response sentiment skews negative (22 negative vs 3 positive markers). Agent may be overly cautious or anxious.
patterns.prescription: Check big_five.emotional_stability and therapy_dimensions.distress_tolerance. Agent may be mirroring user frustration.

patterns.name: Error recovery
patterns.description: Average recovery: 1.0 messages to return to productive state after an error.

prescriptions.reason: Emotional Stability is suppressed in practice (30% vs spec 80%). The agent isn't expressing this trait as strongly as specified.
Set communication.uncertainty_handling to 'confident_transparency' — state uncertainty without apologizing for it.
Add to growth.patterns_to_watch: 'excessive hedging'. Consider increasing big_five.extraversion.facets.assertiveness.
Openness is suppressed in practice (66% vs spec 85%). The agent isn't expressing this trait as strongly as specified.
Check big_five.emotional_stability and therapy_dimensions.distress_tolerance. Agent may be mirroring user frustration.
